name: Corporate Wellness Form Validation
description:
As a user of Practo
  I want to verify that the Corporate Wellness form shows warnings
  When invalid details are submitted

steps.name: the hospital listing page should load
I collect the top 20 hospital links
I visit each hospital and filter by Open 24x7, Parking facility, and Rating above 3.5
I display the names of all matching hospitals

name: Finding Hospitals in Bangalore
description:
As a user of Practo
  I want to find hospitals in Bangalore that are open 24x7,
  have parking, and are rated above 3.5
  So that I can choose the best healthcare facility
